title: Create + Origins
description: Create + Origins is a survival focused modpack that aims to improve the survival experience with new mods.
body:
# Create + Origins
Create + Origins is a modpack that aims to improve vanilla by combining 2 of the best mods.
## Features
- Origins: Lets you pick an origin that will give you powers, but with disadvantages that come with them
- Create: Make factories, trains, and more.
- Argonauts: Create a faction
- Waystones: Make waystones that allow you to teleport
- Vivecraft: Play in VR with friends (may require some manual balancing)
- e4mc: Play with friends without needing a server
### QOL
- Iris: Use optifine shaders
- AppleSkin: See how much hunger your food will restore
### Notes
_If you are using this on your own server, you may want to do manual balancing of abilities_
